title: carpinus hupeana var. simplicidentata
intro: Carpinus hupeana var. simplicidentata, also known as the Hupe's hop hornbeam, is a variety of the Carpinus hupeana tree, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Carpinus hupeana var. simplicidentata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
